subject: fix(graph): darken label palette so white text is always readable
body:
Replaced light palette colors (amber, yellow, lime, cyan) with darker
variants that all have luminance ≤ 0.35. Removed the per-node contrast
helper — white text now works on every palette color without per-node
luminance calculation.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, palette, simplification
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: patch
